body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Update to Insolation v0.8, making necessary interface changes to `instantaneous_zenith_angle` calls. This PR also removes `orbital_data` from `PrescribedRadiativeFluxes` because it's no longer necessary.

closes #381

## To-do
- [x] update Insolation compat to "0.8"
- [x] update `instantaneous_zenith_angle` usage
- [x] qualify Insolation funcs with `Insolation.` for clarity
- [x] update `zenith_angle` function args in Canopy src (remove orbital_data)
- [x] rm `orbital_data` from `PrescribedRadiativeFluxes` (no longer used)
title: use Insolation v0.8

title: tag v0.4.1

body:
- Fix type instability in `precipitation` in test
- Remove one abstract type from one function
- Start extracting the floating point type from the state
- Ensure that time is always Float64 even in the savet array
title: More steps toward GPU compatibility
